appraisal_events.evidence: « ... l'indifférence qu'on lui savait pour toute femme qui n'était pas son actrice lui donnait aux yeux de celles-ci un prestige singulier »; « Quel joli garçon ! Moi je le trouve épatant; et quel chic ! ... Et un chic type en tout. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The women of Rivebelle attribute prestige to Saint-Loup and praise him for his bearing and chic; a slight mocking counterpoint (about his fidelity/mistress) does not cancel the dominant admiration.

status_effects.explanation: His local prestige with the women is increased by their insistent looks, their praises, and their allusions to a past intimacy.
